Hey there!
My name is Leonhard, but most people just call me Lenni. I am a master student in psychology at the University of Vienna. My research interest consists of judgment & decision making, data science with R, meta-science and Bayesian statistics. Combining the latter two, I am currently working on a Bayesian random-effect meta-analysis as my master thesis. I value open-science and reproducible workflows. If you want to check out some of the stuff that I do, see my Github and OSF.
As today I work both at the University of Vienna as a student assistant at the Social and Economic Psychology group under Prof. Dr. Robert Böhm and at the Institute for Cognition and Behavior of the WU Vienna as a research intern under Prof. Dr. Susann Fiedler.
I love reading books, especially R or quantitative science related ones. So if you want to chat about stats, give me book recommendations or want to collaborate write me an email :)
